description: Reorganize your stock portfolio by moving tech stocks from the default 'My Portfolio' to a dedicated portfolio. Create a new portfolio named 'Tech Portfolio' and transfer the Microsoft (MSFT) and NVIDIA (NVDA) holdings from 'My Portfolio' into it. Ensure that the purchase price and quantity for MSFT and NVDA in the new portfolio match their original entries exactly. Upon completion, 'My Portfolio' should only contain Apple (AAPL).
